acceptance_criteria: Add FLOW-* eval/spec coverage for this edge-tokenization case; Selkie output matches Mermaid reference for the PR #722 fi label without regressing quoted edge labels ending in x.
description: Flowchart eval still reports channel_flowchart_refactoring labels_missing: Mermaid reference renders the unquoted dotted edge label in R6 -.PR #722 fix.-> F1 as PR #722 fi, while Selkie renders PR #722 fix. This appears to be Mermaid tokenization treating the trailing x before .-> as edge syntax rather than label text. Review Mermaid flowchart parser behavior before changing Selkie.
title: flowchart: match Mermaid tokenization for unquoted dotted edge labels ending in x
